label.description: Feature label used by the feature showcase block.

description.example: This feature clarifies the main idea through a focused visual explanation.

icon.description: Required Remix Icon class because the BlockSpec requires icons.

color.description: Optional color token accepted by related item structures.

prompt_example.title: Key Features

items.label: Core Feature
items.description: This feature clarifies the main idea through a focused visual explanation.

items.label: Support Feature
items.description: This feature connects supporting evidence to the learner's practical takeaway.

prompt_example.image_prompt: Clean instructional visual for the central concept

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly feature_showcase_block.
Every item must include an icon.
Use label and description for each item.
